2023-24 Long Beach State Beach Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 21-15 (10-10, 5th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Dan Monson

PS/G: 77.4 (74th of 362)

PA/G: 76.0 (295th of 362)

SRS: -1.19 (170th of 362)

SOS: -1.19 (157th of 362)

ORtg: 105.4 (197th of 362)

DRtg: 103.5 (170th of 362)

NCAA Tournament: (#15 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (85-65) versus #2 Arizona

  • Big West Tourney Champ
